title: Members and authority
description: Invite people, grant roles, and take them back.

steps.title: Who is in the organisation
steps.description: And exactly what each of them may do.
steps.voiceScript: Everyone in the organisation, and what each of them is authorised to do.
steps.captionText: Everyone in the organisation, and what each of them is authorised to do.
steps.fallbackMessage: Who is in the organisation: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Invite someone
steps.voiceScript: Invite a colleague by username or email.
steps.captionText: Invite a colleague by username or email.
steps.fallbackMessage: Invite someone: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Grant a role
steps.description: The gates ask for the ROLE, not the permission.
steps.voiceScript: Grant them a role. The stage gates ask for a named role, so this is how somebody becomes able to sign a gate.
steps.captionText: Grant them a role. The stage gates ask for a named role, so this is how somebody becomes able to sign a gate.
steps.fallbackMessage: Grant a role: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Revoking is real
steps.description: Take a role back and the authority goes with it.
steps.voiceScript: Roles can be taken back, and the authority goes with them. Re-inviting somebody who left starts them from nothing -- their old roles do not quietly come back.
steps.captionText: Roles can be taken back, and the authority goes with them. Re-inviting somebody who left starts them from nothing -- their old roles do not quietly come back.
steps.fallbackMessage: Revoking is real: not visible on this screen yet.
